name: Chicken Hekka
recipeIngredient: 14 ounces canned shredded bamboo shoots, drained
8 ounces long rice, soaked and cut into 2-inch lengths
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice the chicken into serving pieces.
2. In a bowl, combine sugar, soy sauce, and mirin.
3. Heat oil to medium high in a skillet or wok.
4. Squeeze juice from grated ginger into the wok.
5. Add ginger and stir-fry until brown; discard ginger fibers.
6. Add chicken and stir-fry over high heat.
7. Add soy sauce mixture and cook for 2 more minutes.
8. Add vegetables, one at a time, and stir-fry after each addition.
9. Add long rice and cook for 3 more minutes, or until done.
10. Makes 8 to 10 servings.
